description: A payment processing system has a critical bug: when a transaction fails and rolls back, the security audit logs recording the attempt are also lost. Implement persistent logging using Autonomous Transactions (PRAGMA AUTONOMOUS_TRANSACTION) so that log entries are saved independently of the main transaction. Using the legacy code in /home/ga/Desktop/legacy_payment_code.sql, create a logging procedure and update the PROCESS_TRANSFER procedure to ensure audit logs persist even during rollbacks. Demonstrate the fix by attempting a $5000 transfer from User 1001 ($1000 balance) to User 1002 and export the resulting SYSTEM_LOGS to /home/ga/Desktop/audit_evidence.txt.
